project_type: Node.js distributed task queue engine (monorepo: shared, server, worker)
build_system: npm workspaces, tsc per workspace. Must build shared first: npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/shared
test_framework: Vitest with ioredis-mock and mock pg Pool. Tests in tests/ directory. ioredis-mock does NOT support BLMOVE so worker tests use processOne() directly.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build (builds shared, server, worker in order). 2. Run npm test (vitest run). All tests except the known flaky rate-limiter timing test should pass.
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed. Run npm run build to compile all workspaces.
environment_constraints: No persistent background services (Redis/Postgres). Tests must use ioredis-mock and mock pg Pool. ioredis-mock supports SET EX, HSET, HGETALL, SADD, SREM, SMEMBERS, LRANGE, LREM, LPUSH, DEL, EXISTS, TTL but NOT BLMOVE/EVAL.
contribution_requirements: ESM modules with type:module, NodeNext resolution. Strict TypeScript with noUncheckedIndexedAccess and exactOptionalPropertyTypes. No implicit any.
key_patterns: Worker uses processOne() for testability. Tests use createMockPool() pattern returning {pool, queries} to track Postgres calls. Redis keys centralized in shared/src/keys.ts. Job state stored in Redis hashes + Postgres. Worker class takes {redis, pg, queue, workerId} deps. Handlers registered via worker.register(jobName, fn). Private methods tested via (worker as any).methodName().
directory_structure: shared/ - types, keys, db helpers, redis client factory. server/ - Express API + Producer class. worker/ - Worker class, Scheduler, CronManager, RateLimiter, handlers registry. tests/ - Vitest test files (phase1-3). examples/ - smoke test. infra/postgres/ - SQL migrations.
